title: Canonical Proposal
description: HITL (Human-in-the-Loop) promotion queue entry in PostgreSQL. Proposals are scored by the curator engine and stored here pending human approval. Once approved, they are promoted to Neo4j as InsightHead/Insight nodes.

group_id.description: Tenant namespace. CHECK constraint: must match ^allura-.

reasoning.description: Curator engine's reasoning for the score.

trace_ref.description: Foreign key to events.id (the originating trace event). ON DELETE SET NULL.

decided_at.description: Timestamp when the proposal was approved or rejected.

decided_by.description: Identifier of the person or system that made the decision (e.g., curator-cli, sabir).

witness_hash.description: SHAKE-256 hash (64-byte output) of the decision payload for audit trail integrity.

notion_synced_at.description: Timestamp when the proposal was synced to Notion.
